positive: Minimalist and highly stylized illustration of a nocturnal cityscape viewed through a geometric, stylized window frame. The scene features glowing neon signs, abstract constellations, and stylized silhouettes of modern buildings, rendered with a high-contrast, limited color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, and vibrant magenta. The overall style is a fusion of vaporwave aesthetics and Art Deco geometry, emphasizing clean lines and strong, graphic shapes. Central composition, perfect for apparel print. Studio lighting, crisp outlines, vector art quality, 4k, highly detailed.
negative: blurry, noisy, low resolution, amateur, watermark, signature, logo, text, artifact, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy
